case_title: AMERICAN AIRPORTER SHUTTLE VS DAMELIO, VANESSA JON SILVA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY AMERICAN AIRPORTER SHUTTLE AS TO DEFENDANT DAMELIO, VANESSA JON SILVA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
THE PLTF HAS FILED THREE $5000. SINCE APRIL 1995 TO PRESENT. CASE #756638 WOULD MAKE IT FOUR.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DAMELIO, VANESSA JON SILVA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN AIRPORTER SHUTTLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAMELIO, VANESSA JON SILVA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,080.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DAMELIO, VANESSA JON SILVA HEARING SET FOR AUG-01-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-01-1996, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DAMELIO, VANESSA JON SILVA PLAINTIFF HAS ALREADY FILED AT LEAST TWO CASES IN EXCESS OF 2,500.00 SINCE 1-1-96.CCP 116.231. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
